summary: Excellent 5‑star show with Pigpen’s harp on Dupree's Diamond Blues; recording quality praised though not detailed.
review: All three reviewers gave the tape five stars, highlighting the nostalgic set drawn from Anthem of the Sun and Aoxomoxoa and especially noting Pigpen’s harmonica on Dupree's Diamond Blues. While no specific technical comments were made, the overall tone suggests a solid recording that captures the energy of this early‑1969 performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer ratings (5 stars) and enthusiastic comments about the music indicate a top‑tier show; lack of technical criticism implies at least good recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on specific audio issues; overall satisfaction suggests acceptable to good sound quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on pacing, but reviewers appreciate the album‑focused set and consider it a valuable addition to a 1969 collection.
